form.label: Overview
form.description: GenAI Observability Platform - Quick overview of your AI workloads (accelerated via the GenAI_Traces data model)

search.query: | tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count as count from datamodel=GenAI_Traces

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true sum(GenAI_Span.input_tokens) as in_tok sum(GenAI_Span.output_tokens) as out_tok from datamodel=GenAI_Traces by GenAI_Span.model_name | rename GenAI_Span.* as * | lookup genai_model_pricing model_name OUTPUT input_price_per_1k output_price_per_1k | eval cost=(coalesce(in_tok,0)/1000)*coalesce(input_price_per_1k,0)+(coalesce(out_tok,0)/1000)*coalesce(output_price_per_1k,0) | stats sum(cost) as total
| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true avg(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as avg_latency from datamodel=GenAI_Traces

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count as total_requests sum(GenAI_Span.is_error) as error_count from datamodel=GenAI_Traces | eval error_rate=round((error_count/total_requests)*100,2) | fields error_rate
| tstats prestats=t summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count from datamodel=GenAI_Traces by _time span=1h | timechart span=1h count as Requests
| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count as count from datamodel=GenAI_Traces by GenAI_Span.model_name | rename GenAI_Span.model_name as model_name | sort - count

| tstats prestats=t summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true perc50(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) perc95(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) perc99(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) from datamodel=GenAI_Traces by _time span=1h | timechart span=1h perc50(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as P50 perc95(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as P95 perc99(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as P99

| tstats prestats=t summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true sum(GenAI_Span.input_tokens) sum(GenAI_Span.output_tokens) from datamodel=GenAI_Traces by _time span=1h | timechart span=1h sum(GenAI_Span.input_tokens) as "Input Tokens" sum(GenAI_Span.output_tokens) as "Output Tokens"

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count as requests avg(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as avg_latency from datamodel=GenAI_Traces by GenAI_Span.workflow_name | rename GenAI_Span.workflow_name as workflow_name | sort - requests | head 10 | eval avg_latency=round(avg_latency,0) | rename workflow_name as "Workflow", requests as "Requests", avg_latency as "Avg Latency (ms)"
`genai_traces_index` is_error=1 | sort - _time | head 10 | table _time, workflow_name, span_type | rename _time as "Time", workflow_name as "Workflow", span_type as "Span Type"
